resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def bitwiseComplement(self, n: int) -> int:
        return n ^ ((1 << n.bit_length()) - 1)
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses bitwise operations to flip all the bits of the input number, which is the definition of the complement.
